data: {"generalSituation":"With the broad trough of low pressure weakening and the subtropical ridge progressively covering the coast of Guangdong, showers will ease off gradually and the weather will become fine and very hot over the region in the next couple of days. An area of low pressure is expected to develop into a tropical cyclone gradually over the seas east of the Philippines. It will enter the northern part of the South China Sea in the latter part of this week, and move in the general direction of the vicinity of the coast of Guangdong over the weekend and intensify progressively. However, there are uncertainties in its landfall position. It will be windy with squally showers and thunderstorms over the region. There will be swells. Under the influence of a southerly airstream, the weather will remain unsettled over the coast of southern China early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260722","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"South force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods and a few showers.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":32,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":27,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":90,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":70,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":53,"PSR":"Medium Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260723","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"South force 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine apart from isolated showers.
